name: FiberLaserCam
description: DXF hatch and contour-offset workflow plugin for KiCad PCB fabrication prep.
description_full: FiberLaserCam exports KiCad PCB geometry to DXF and generates hatch lines or contour offsets for downstream fiber laser workflows. Settings, zone selection, and a live in-window preview are all in a single native KiCad dialog.
